commands.review_summary:
The PR adds six primary smoke-ci taxonomy coverage IDs to existing QA scenario YAML files without changing runtime code or release gates.

PR surface: Other +6. Total +6 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is QA scorecard metadata, not a user bug. The source-verifiable check is that current main lacks the six final primary IDs while the existing scenarios already exercise the matched behaviors.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair job is needed; this protected maintainer PR has no review findings and should proceed through normal maintainer review plus required checks.

target.title: Add smoke-ci primary scorecard evidence
target.body:
## Summary
- add primary smoke-ci scorecard evidence links for six high-value already-covered behaviors
- cover Control UI bootstrap, cron RPC/announce delivery, protected Prometheus scrape, media generation persistence, and thread placement
- keep this as metadata-only scenario coverage wiring; no release gate is added

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-packs.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/qa-coverage-report.ts --json`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check qa/scenarios/ui/control-ui-qa-channel-image-roundtrip.yaml qa/scenarios/scheduling/cron-one-minute-ping.yaml qa/scenarios/runtime/docker-prometheus-smoke.yaml qa/scenarios/media/image-generation-roundtrip.yaml qa/scenarios/channels/thread-follow-up.yaml qa/scenarios/media/image-understanding-attachment.yaml qa/scenarios/personal/approval-denial-stop.yaml`
- `git diff --check`

## Coverage impact
- unknown taxonomy coverage IDs remain `0`
- smoke-ci missing-primary warnings drop from `77` to `71`

## Review notes
- kept `dangerous-tool-safeguards` unclaimed because the existing denial scenario does not attempt a dangerous tool
- kept `image-and-pdf-input-routing` unclaimed because the existing media scenario only proves image attachment routing, not PDF routing
target.author: romneyda
